data.name: auth.password_helper
data.value: At least 8 characters. A passphrase is recommended.

data.name: setup.lede
data.value: This is a fresh install. Create your admin account below — it will have full access, including user management.

data.name: password.lede
data.value: Enter your current password and choose a new one.

data.name: users.lede
data.value: Everyone with access to this NimShare instance. Admins can create, disable, and remove accounts.

data.name: users.confirm.delete
data.value: Delete this user? Their files and links will remain.

data.name: browse.root.lede
data.value: Pick a space to work in. Your own files stay private; the public bucket is shared; each group has its own pool.

data.name: browse.tile.public.lede
data.value: Shared with everyone signed in on this NimShare.

data.name: browse.tile.groups.lede
data.value: Files shared inside each of your teams.

data.name: browse.tile.groups.empty
data.value: You aren't a member of any group yet. Ask an admin to add you.

data.name: modal.share.for_file
data.value: Recipient will be able to download this file.

data.name: modal.share.for_folder
data.value: Recipient will see all files in this folder.

data.name: modal.upload_request.lede
data.value: Send someone a link they can use to upload files directly into this folder.

data.name: groups.lede
data.value: Teams that share a common pool of files. Managers can add members and manage the group's files; members can read and upload.

data.name: groups.empty
data.value: You're not a member of any group yet.

data.name: groups.confirm.delete
data.value: Delete this group? All its shared files will be un-scoped.

data.name: browse.personal.lede
data.value: Files only you can see. Share via link for anyone else to reach them.

data.name: browse.public.lede
data.value: Files everyone signed in on this NimShare can see and add to.

data.name: browse.group.lede
data.value: Files shared with everyone in this group. Managers can delete anything; members can delete what they uploaded.

data.name: links.email.to
data.value: Send this share link to which email address?

data.name: profile.lede
data.value: Your name, email and optional profile picture. Change your password too.

data.name: profile.email_note
data.value: Contact an administrator to change your email.

data.name: profile.avatar_helper
data.value: Paste a public image URL. Falls back to your initials on the sidebar.

data.name: users.invite.lede
data.value: The recipient gets a one-time link, sets their own password, and lands directly in NimShare.

data.name: users.create_new.lede
data.value: Prefer to set a password yourself and share it out-of-band? Use the classic create form instead.

data.name: invite.accept.lede
data.value: You've been invited to NimShare as

data.name: invite.invalid.body
data.value: The link is expired, already used, or was revoked. Ask the sender for a fresh invite.

data.name: email_gateway.lede
data.value: Choose how NimShare sends outbound email — download notifications, share-by-email, invitations. Secrets are encrypted at rest.

data.name: email_gateway.leave_blank
data.value: Leave blank to keep the current value.

data.name: welcome.subhead
data.value: Upload once, share via personalised links with expiry, password, download limits — on your own Azure tenant.

data.name: welcome.bullet1
data.value: Custom slugs, passwords, expiry, download caps

data.name: welcome.bullet2
data.value: Multi-user with Microsoft Entra ID sign-in

data.name: welcome.bullet4
data.value: API-first — iOS and Android clients coming

data.name: dashboard.lede
data.value: A quick view of your files, links, and storage.

data.name: dashboard.no_files
data.value: No files yet — start with your first upload.

data.name: upload.lede
data.value: Drop a file, then configure the sharing rules.

data.name: upload.slug_helper
data.value: 3–64 characters, lowercase letters, digits, "-" or "_". Leave empty for a random slug.

data.name: upload.notify_me
data.value: Notify me by email on download

data.name: links.lede
data.value: Every share link you've created. Revoke, adjust, or delete.

data.name: links.confirm.revoke
data.value: Revoke this link? The file stays; the URL stops working.

data.name: links.confirm.delete
data.value: Delete this link permanently? The file stays.

data.name: email.download.body
email.upload.subject
data.value: Someone uploaded '{0}' to your inbox link

data.name: email.upload.body
settings.lede
data.value: Your profile, language, and custom share domains.

data.name: settings.language_note
data.value: Switch languages any time from the sidebar footer. Public share pages honour your recipient's browser language automatically.

data.name: settings.domains_note
data.value: Serve your share links from your own domain, e.g. share.your-company.com. Requires a CNAME + a TXT verification record.

data.name: landing.title
data.value: Someone shared a file with you

data.name: landing.password.label
data.value: This link is protected — enter the password:

data.name: share.expired.body
data.value: Ask the sender for a fresh link.

data.name: share.notfound.body
data.value: The link either doesn't exist or has been revoked.

data.name: upload.landing.title
data.value: You've been asked to send a file

data.name: upload.notfound.body
data.value: The link either doesn't exist or has been revoked.

data.name: upload.expired.body
data.value: Ask the sender for a fresh link.

data.name: profile.picture.lede
data.value: Click the circle to pick a new picture from your device. You can zoom and drag to fit your face.

data.name: profile.crop.lede
data.value: Drag to move, use the slider to zoom. The circle preview matches what others will see.

data.name: links.restrict.allowed_hint
data.value: Comma-separated. Wildcards: @company.com, *.company.com, or a full email address.

data.name: links.restrict.otp_label
data.value: Recipient must verify via 6-digit code sent to their email

data.name: landing_admin.public_scope_note
data.value: Shown on every download from the public library. Only the admin can change it.

data.name: landing_admin.personal_scope_note
data.value: Shown on every download from My files (your personal library).

data.name: bulk.confirm.delete
data.value: Delete {n} files? This cannot be undone.

data.name: move.helper
data.value: Only folders you have write access to are listed.

data.name: move.hint.single
data.value: Choose where to move this file.

data.name: ai.lede
data.value: Configure your AI provider once, then enable individual features. Keys are encrypted at rest.

data.name: ai.model_helper
data.value: Leave blank for the recommended default of your provider.

data.name: ai.api_key_helper
data.value: Leave blank to keep the current key. Stored encrypted.

data.name: ai.features_lede
data.value: Turn individual capabilities on or off. Each call uses your configured provider.

data.name: ai.feat.auto_summary.desc
data.value: Recipients can generate a 2-3 sentence summary before downloading.

data.name: ai.feat.smart_tags.desc
data.value: Auto-classify uploads with 2-5 keywords for filtering.

data.name: ai.feat.semantic_search.desc
data.value: Find files by meaning, not just filename.

data.name: ai.feat.risk_detect.desc
data.value: Scan public uploads for PII, credit cards, secrets.

data.name: ai.feat.email_drafts.desc
data.value: Draft-with-AI button in the send-by-email dialog.

data.name: ai.feat.chat.desc
data.value: RAG-based chat over your own files.

data.name: landing.ai_summary.disabled
data.value: AI summary is disabled by the administrator.

data.name: landing.ai_summary.unsupported
data.value: This file type isn't supported for AI summaries yet.

data.name: landing.ai_summary.error
data.value: Couldn't generate a summary. Try again later.

data.name: chat.lede
data.value: Ask questions about the files in a scope. Uses semantic search + your configured AI provider.

data.name: chat.disabled
data.value: Chat with files is currently disabled by the administrator (enable it under Settings > AI gateway).

data.name: chat.no_context
data.value: I could not find matching files. Try different words.

data.name: chat.note
data.value: Answers are grounded only in files you can access. No content leaves without your click.

data.name: browse.search.placeholder
data.value: Search across your files by meaning...

data.name: browse.search.disabled
data.value: Semantic search is disabled by the administrator.

data.name: browse.search.no_hits
data.value: No matching files found in this scope.

data.name: preview.unsupported
data.value: Inline preview is not supported for this file type yet.

data.name: links.email.ai_disabled
data.value: AI-drafted emails are disabled by the administrator.

data.name: links.email.placeholder
data.value: Add a short note or click 'Draft with AI' to auto-generate one.

data.name: activity.lede
data.value: Events and changes across files and shares.

data.name: trash.lede
data.value: Deleted files can be restored or permanently purged.

data.name: favorites.hint
data.value: Click ⭐ on any file or folder to add it here.

data.name: shared.lede
data.value: Files and folders others have granted you access to.

data.name: sig.reminder.body
data.value:
Hi {0},
this is a reminder — {1} is waiting for your {2} on '{3}'.
Deadline: {4}
— NimShare

data.name: sig.invite.body_signer
sig.invite.body_viewer
sig.next.body
data.value:
Hi {0},
you are next in the sequence. Please {1} the document '{2}'.
{3}
— NimShare

data.name: sig.manual_remind.body
sig.completed.notif.body
data.value: The signed PDF is now in your library.

data.name: err.user_exists
data.value: A user with that email already exists.

data.name: err.last_admin
data.value: Cannot remove or demote the last active admin.

data.name: err.last_manager
data.value: Cannot remove or demote the last manager.

data.name: err.quota_range
data.value: Quota must be between 1 GB and 10 TB.

data.name: err.entra_only
data.value: This account uses Entra sign-in; there is no local password to change.

data.name: err.password_too_short
data.value: New password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: err.image_too_large
data.value: Image is too large (max 3 MiB after cropping).

data.name: users.reset_password.helper
data.value: Sends an email with a new password to the user.

data.name: links.public.lede
data.value: Links provided by the administrator. You can use and share them, but not modify or delete.

data.name: users.public.lede
data.value: Rights in the public library. Admins always have full rights.

data.name: office.lede
data.value: Connect NimShare to an OnlyOffice or Collabora Document Server to edit Word/Excel/PowerPoint files in the browser.

data.name: office.doc_server_url_hint
data.value: Base URL of the OnlyOffice/Collabora server, no path.

data.name: office.jwt_secret_hint
data.value: Must match on both sides. Stored encrypted.

data.name: office.howto.1
data.value: Deploy an OnlyOffice Docker container or Collabora server.

data.name: office.howto.2
data.value: Enter the URL and JWT secret above.

data.name: office.howto.3
data.value: Open a Word/Excel/PowerPoint file in your library — the Edit button appears automatically.

data.name: office.howto.4
data.value: While editing, the file is locked so no one writes in parallel.

data.name: wiki.lede
data.value: Markdown pages per person and per group. Great for internal docs, meeting notes, how-tos.

data.name: wiki.groups.none
data.value: You are not in any group.

data.name: wiki.no_pages_in_group
data.value: No pages in this group yet.

data.name: sig.lede
data.value: Signature requests for colleagues or external recipients.

data.name: sig.new.hint_upload_tab
data.value: New file? Switch to "Upload new" above.

data.name: sig.new.upload_hint
data.value: Lands automatically in My library → Signatures.

data.name: sig.new.step2_lede
data.value: Each person with email + name + role. Signature fields are placed visually in the next step.

data.name: sig.new.step3_lede
data.value: Pick recipient + field type, then drag on the PDF to place the field. Right-click a field to delete.

data.name: sig.new.err.no_sigfield_confirm
data.value: No signature field placed — send anyway?

data.name: sig.new.send.email_failed_prefix
data.value: Signature request created, but email failed for these recipients:

data.name: sig.new.send.check_email_gateway
data.value: Check /settings/email — the email gateway may be disabled or misconfigured.

data.name: sig.confirm_delete
data.value: Delete this signature request and all its participants, fields and audit entries? This cannot be undone.

data.name: dbset.lede
data.value: Which database NimShare stores its metadata in. Sqlite is the default and works out of the box. Azure SQL is recommended once you outgrow single-server hosting.

data.name: dbset.wizard.hint
data.value: Point NimShare at your existing Azure SQL Server. The wizard will connect with the admin login, create the target database if it doesn't exist yet, optionally copy your existing rows across, and restart the app.

data.name: dbset.field.rawconn_hint
data.value: Point at the master DB — the wizard switches Initial Catalog when it creates the target.

data.name: dbset.field.dbname_hint
data.value: Alphanumeric, dash or underscore. Created as Basic tier if it doesn't exist.

data.name: dbset.switch.restarting
data.value: App is restarting — this page will reload once it comes back.

data.name: dbset.confirm.switch
data.value: This will restart the app and switch it to the new database. Continue?

data.name: dbset.warn.migration
data.value: The schema is applied via proper EF migrations — future upgrades run MigrateAsync at startup on both providers.

data.name: dbset.warn.firewall
data.value: Make sure the Azure SQL firewall allows the App Service's outbound IP (or turn on "Allow Azure services").

data.name: dbset.warn.restart
data.value: The app restarts after switching. Ongoing sessions stay logged in; in-flight uploads are aborted.

data.name: dbset.revert.hint
data.value: Deletes the DB config file and restarts. The app comes back on the original Sqlite path — your Azure SQL database stays untouched, so you can flip back later.

data.name: dbset.confirm.revert
data.value: Revert to Sqlite and restart? Any writes since the switch stay on Azure SQL and won't be copied back.

data.name: dbset.err.timeout
data.value: Timed out — the server didn't respond. Check the Azure SQL firewall and admin credentials, then try again.

data.name: sig.reassign.body
data.value:
Hello {0},
{1} <{2}> has forwarded the signature request for "{3}" to you.
Please open this link to sign: {4}
— NimShare

data.name: ai.err.no_listing
data.value: Provider does not support model listing.

data.name: ai.err.azure_bad_endpoint
data.value: Endpoint must be an https://*.openai.azure.com or *.cognitiveservices.azure.com URL.

data.name: certs.err.pfx_decrypt
data.value: PFX could not be decrypted — check the password.

data.name: certs.err.no_private_key
data.value: PFX does not contain a private key.

data.name: certs.err.name_cn_required
data.value: Name and Common Name are required.

data.name: certs.err.name_pfx_required
data.value: Name and PFX file are required.

data.name: certs.err.pfx_too_large
data.value: PFX must be smaller than 512 KB.

data.name: certs.lede
data.value: Create a self-signed certificate for digital signatures in NimShare, or import an existing PKCS#12 (.pfx/.p12).

data.name: certs.new_self.hint
data.value: A self-signed certificate identifies you as the signer inside NimShare and stamps a verifiable audit page onto every signed PDF. External CA validation still needs an imported cert.

data.name: certs.import.hint
data.value: Upload an existing PKCS#12 file (.pfx or .p12). We need the file's password to unwrap the private key — the password is never stored.

data.name: certs.empty
data.value: No certificates yet. Create one to start signing.

data.name: certs.field.pfxpw_hint
data.value: Used only to unwrap the file — not stored.

data.name: certs.err.missing
data.value: Please fill in name and common name.

data.name: certs.err.no_file
data.value: Please pick a PFX file first.

data.name: email_tpl.lede
data.value: Your own subject + body copy for signature invites. Reused across every request; picked in the wizard.

data.name: email_tpl.empty
data.value: No templates yet. The wizard falls back to the built-in NimShare copy.

data.name: email_tpl.body_ph
email_tpl.ai_hint
data.value: Describe the tone or context — the AI writes subject + body with placeholders.

data.name: email_tpl.ai_prompt_ph
data.value: Formal legal contract for external counterparty

data.name: contacts.lede
data.value: Personal contacts used to pre-fill signature requests. Emails are autocompleted in the wizard.

data.name: contacts.empty
data.value: No contacts yet. Anyone you send a signature request to is added automatically.

data.name: contacts.search_ph
data.value: Search name, email, company or tag…

data.name: folder_icon.hint
data.value: Pick an emoji and a colour to make this folder easier to spot in the tree.

data.name: sig.new.template_hint
data.value: Use one of your saved templates, or leave empty to use the built-in localised copy.

data.name: dev.lede
data.value: Personal API tokens and webhooks for external automation.

data.name: dev.tokens.lede
data.value: Use tokens for iOS app, CI scripts or automations. Header: Authorization: NimShare-Token <token>.

data.name: dev.tokens.copy_once
data.value: Please copy now — it is shown only once.

data.name: dev.webhooks.lede
data.value: Receive POST callbacks on events (upload, download, signature). Header X-NimShare-Signature: sha256=… = HMAC(secret, body).
